# llms.txt - Agent Navigation Guide for HL Privateer

Project purpose:
- Build and operate a self-hosted agentic trading platform on Hyperliquid with deterministic risk hard-gates.

Primary entrypoints:
- Product + architecture: `docs/SPEC.md`
- API contracts: `API.md`
- Security policies: `SECURITY.md`
- Operations: `RUNBOOK.md`
- Go-live checklist: `docs/GO_LIVE.md`
- Agent runner dev: `docs/AGENT_RUNNER.md`
- Agent capabilities: `skills.md`
- x402 setup: `docs/X402_SELLER_QUICKSTART.md`

Repository map for agents:
- `apps/api`: REST, auth, x402 enforcement
- `apps/runtime`: strategy orchestration and OMS integration
- `apps/ws-gateway`: websocket fanout and command channel
- `apps/web`: ASCII floor UI and operator console
- `packages/contracts`: zod schemas and shared types
- `packages/risk-engine`: deterministic risk checks (hard-gate)
- `packages/plugin-sdk`: plugin contract and sandbox rules
- `packages/event-bus`: Redis Streams adapters and replay
- `packages/agent-sdk`: external agent client utilities

External-agent execution map:
- Use `POST /v1/agent/handshake` to obtain entitlement context and negotiated capabilities.
- Pay-protected routes are enforced by `x402` + entitlement checks:
  - `GET /v1/agent/stream/snapshot` (`stream.read.public`)
  - `GET /v1/agent/analysis/latest` (`analysis.read`)
  - `GET /v1/agent/analysis` (`analysis.read`)
  - `GET /v1/agent/positions` (`command.positions`)
  - `GET /v1/agent/orders` (`command.positions`)
  - `GET /v1/agent/data/overview` (`market.data.read`)
  - `GET /v1/agent/insights` (`agent.insights.read`)
  - `GET /v1/agent/copy-trade/signals` (`copy.signals.read`)
  - `GET /v1/agent/copy-trade/positions` (`copy.positions.read`)
- Commands and control are available via `POST /v1/agent/command` with capability-guarded actor checks.

Mandatory constraints for all agent-generated changes:
- Never bypass risk engine for order execution.
- Preserve discretionary long/short planning with explicit strategy thesis and risk controls.
- Preserve equal-notional enforcement and risk circuit breakers.
- Public responses must expose PnL percent only and obfuscated fields.
- Any privileged command requires audit reason.
- External-facing agents should respect capability gates and dynamic risk policy adjustments emitted in `riskPolicy` payloads.

Agent workflow:
1. Read contracts in `packages/contracts` before editing service code.
2. Propose changes as typed interfaces first.
3. Ensure new endpoints/events are reflected in `API.md`.
4. Add or update threat assumptions in `SECURITY.md` when security-sensitive.
5. Add runbook steps in `RUNBOOK.md` when operational behavior changes.

Definition of safe completion:
- Type-safe interfaces updated.
- Risk and auth boundaries preserved.
- Audit trail coverage maintained.
- Docs updated for humans and agents.
